title: gymnadenia conopsea subsp. serotina
intro: Gymnadenia conopsea subsp. serotina, also known as late summer fragrant orchid, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Gymnadenia conopsea subsp. serotina include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms of various ailments.
